mapper.select: WITH RECURSIVE bom_tree (id, parent_material_code, child_material_code, quantity, created_at, updated_at) AS ( SELECT id, parent_material_code, child_material_code, quantity, created_at, updated_at FROM bom_component WHERE parent_material_code = #{rootMaterialCode} UNION ALL SELECT bc.id, bc.parent_material_code, bc.child_material_code, bc.quantity, bc.created_at, bc.updated_at FROM bom_component bc INNER JOIN bom_tree bt ON bc.parent_material_code = bt.child_material_code ) SELECT id, parent_material_code, child_material_code, quantity, created_at, updated_at FROM bom_tree
